pageContext.name: Big Bad Wolf
pageContext.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  Your eyes do not deceive you! Those eyes, nose, and mouth are WAY too big to be Grandma's. This 7 scale, highly articulated, intricately designed ULTIMATES! figure of The Big Bad Wolf from Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf includes multiple interchangeable heads & hands as well as his Grandma disguise. It doesn't matter if your house is made of straw, sticks, bricks, or whatever, this made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! figure of The Big Bad Wolf will be right at home in your collection!
